channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 10 Killed, Dozens Injured In Russian Strikes In Ukraine

media:content.media:description: Russian attacks across Ukraine killed 10 people and wounded dozens on Monday.

item.description: Russian attacks across Ukraine killed 10 people and wounded dozens on Monday, authorities said, with strikes continuing into the afternoon as the death toll climbed.
item.content:encoded: Russian attacks across Ukraine killed 10 people and wounded dozens on Monday, authorities said, with strikes continuing into the afternoon as the death toll climbed.

item.title: Trump To Make First Flight On Qatar-Gifted Jet This Week

media:content.media:description: Trump will take the jet on Wednesday to North Dakota for an event.

item.description: Trump will take the jet on Wednesday to North Dakota for an event marking the 250th anniversary of US independence, a White House official told AFP.
item.content:encoded: Trump will take the jet on Wednesday to North Dakota for an event marking the 250th anniversary of US independence, a White House official told AFP.

item.title: Lebanon Says Israeli Strike Hits South Despite Ceasefire Framework
item.description: Lebanese state media on Monday said an Israeli strike hit the country's south, despite a framework accord signed by the two countries last week aimed at securing a peace deal.
item.content:encoded: Lebanese state media on Monday said an Israeli strike hit the country's south, despite a framework accord signed by the two countries last week aimed at securing a peace deal.

item.title: WhatsApp To Let Users Chat Without Sharing Phone Numbers Soon

media:content.media:description: The company said it would gradually roll out username reservations worldwide.

item.description: The hundreds of millions who use Meta-owned messenger WhatsApp to chat with family, friends or businesses will no longer need to share phone numbers under a coming update, the company said Monday.
item.content:encoded: The hundreds of millions who use Meta-owned messenger WhatsApp to chat with family, friends or businesses will no longer need to share phone numbers under a coming update, the company said Monday.

item.title: 6 Dead In Shooting In Germany, 2 Arrested
item.description: According to police, shots were fired near a youth facility, and they are currently conducting a large-scale operation outside the town centre.
item.content:encoded: According to police, shots were fired near a youth facility, and they are currently conducting a large-scale operation outside the town centre.

item.title: "I Am Not Anti-US, Not Kneeling", Says Italy's Meloni Amid Spat With Trump

media:content.media:description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni on Monday said that she is not anti-American.

item.description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni on Monday said that she is not anti-American but also not "kneeling", amid the recent controversy over US President Donald Trump's comments about the Italian PM.
item.content:encoded: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni on Monday said that she is not anti-American but also not "kneeling", amid the recent controversy over US President Donald Trump's comments about the Italian PM.

item.title: Trump's Push To Overturn $5 Million Sexual Abuse Case Verdict Rejected

media:content.media:description: Trump's attorneys argued the judge broke federal evidence rules in the case.

item.description: Trump's lawyers had argued that allegations leading to the $5 million verdict were propped up by "highly inflammatory" evidentiary rulings,
item.content:encoded: Trump's lawyers had argued that allegations leading to the $5 million verdict were propped up by "highly inflammatory" evidentiary rulings,

item.title: Russia Fines And Jails LGBT Nightclub Owner For 7 Years

media:content.media:description: Russia jails LGBT nightclub owner and two staff in landmark extremism law case.

item.description: Russia jails LGBT nightclub owner and two staff under extremism law in the country's first case since the Supreme Court banned the LGBT movement.
item.content:encoded: Russia jails LGBT nightclub owner and two staff under extremism law in the country's first case since the Supreme Court banned the LGBT movement.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquakes Highlights: Death Count Nears 1,500 After Twin Earthquakes Devastate Venezuela
item.description: Venezuela earthquake Highlights: Some 774 buildings were badly damaged in back-to-back quakes of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 that struck on Wednesday evening, including 189 buildings that have totally collapsed
item.content:encoded: Venezuela earthquake Highlights: Some 774 buildings were badly damaged in back-to-back quakes of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 that struck on Wednesday evening, including 189 buildings that have totally collapsed

item.title: EU Stays Neutral As Heatwave Sparks Fierce Debate On Air Conditioning

media:content.media:description: Europeans have traditionally used AC much less than other parts of the world.

item.description: As heatwaves drive a surge in air conditioning sales, EU officials refuse to regulate home cooling, leaving the environmental debate to nations.
item.content:encoded: As heatwaves drive a surge in air conditioning sales, EU officials refuse to regulate home cooling, leaving the environmental debate to nations.

item.title: Trump Says Iran Requested Meeting Tomorrow, Tehran Denies Claim

media:content.media:description: Trump said the meeting with Iran would happen on Tuesday in Doha.

item.description: The US president has tried to preserve an increasingly fragile interim deal as hostilities have mounted in recent days in the Strait of Hormuz, through which a fifth of the world's oil had been shipped before war began.
item.content:encoded: The US president has tried to preserve an increasingly fragile interim deal as hostilities have mounted in recent days in the Strait of Hormuz, through which a fifth of the world's oil had been shipped before war began.

item.title: In Major Ruling, US Supreme Court 'Supercharges' Donald Trump's Powers

media:content.media:description: No president before Trump had sought to wrest control of the agencies.

item.description: The justices allowed Fed governor Lisa Cook to stay in her job while she fights the Republican president's effort to fire her over allegations of mortgage fraud, which she has denied.
item.content:encoded: The justices allowed Fed governor Lisa Cook to stay in her job while she fights the Republican president's effort to fire her over allegations of mortgage fraud, which she has denied.

item.title: Live Updates: Major Police Op In Germany's Stade After 6 Dead In Mass Shooting
item.description: Atleast 5 people were killed after a shooting rocked the northern German city of Stade on Monday, triggering a massive police operation.
item.content:encoded: Atleast 5 people were killed after a shooting rocked the northern German city of Stade on Monday, triggering a massive police operation.

item.title: UK To Replace Ageing Destroyers With 6 Drone-Deploying Hybrid Warships

media:content.media:description: The announcement late Sunday follows a turbulent period for the ministry and sector.

item.description: The Royal Navy is restructuring its fleet by replacing traditional Type 45 destroyers with six vessels designed to control uncrewed systems.
item.content:encoded: The Royal Navy is restructuring its fleet by replacing traditional Type 45 destroyers with six vessels designed to control uncrewed systems.

item.title: Video Shows Lava Eruptions Up To 700 Feet At Hawaii's Kilauea Volcano

media:content.media:description: It added that the lava fountain from the north vent is reaching an estimated height of 600-700 feet.

item.description: The update was shared by USGS Volcanoes on their X account, along with a video showing the active eruption.
item.content:encoded: The update was shared by USGS Volcanoes on their X account, along with a video showing the active eruption.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Post-War Middle East May Already Be Splitting Into Two New 'Camps'
item.description: We may see a closer Qatar-Oman-Iran trilateral partnership emerging in the coming days, while another grouping already in the making is of Saudi Arabia, Pakistan and Egypt.
item.content:encoded: We may see a closer Qatar-Oman-Iran trilateral partnership emerging in the coming days, while another grouping already in the making is of Saudi Arabia, Pakistan and Egypt.

item.title: UK's Princess Catherine Climbs 3 Mountain Peaks To Raise Cancer Awareness

media:content.media:description: Princess Catherine climbed three UK peaks in 24 hrs to raise funds for cancer charity after her recovery

item.description: Princess Catherine conquered three peaks in 24 hours, raising funds for cancer charity after her inspiring recovery from cancer.
item.content:encoded: Princess Catherine conquered three peaks in 24 hours, raising funds for cancer charity after her inspiring recovery from cancer.

item.title: Search For Flight MH370 Extended For A Year, 12 Years After Disappearance

media:content.media:description: Despite the largest search in aviation history, the plane has not been found.

item.description: Malaysia extends the "no find, no fee" search for missing flight MH370 until June 2027, allowing Ocean Infinity more time to scan for the aircraft.
item.content:encoded: Malaysia extends the "no find, no fee" search for missing flight MH370 until June 2027, allowing Ocean Infinity more time to scan for the aircraft.

item.title: Eight-Year-Old Girl Sets World Record For Limbo Skating Under 16 cm Bar In Ahmedabad

media:content.media:description: The record was achieved by Takshvi Vaghani in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India, on 10 March 2024.

item.description: Her achievement highlights her hard work and determination in reaching a global record at such a young age.
item.content:encoded: Her achievement highlights her hard work and determination in reaching a global record at such a young age.

item.title: Masked 'Batman' Hunts Down Thieves In Mexico And Tapes Them To Poles, Police Launch Manhunt

media:content.media:description: Photos shared on X show some of the men with moustaches and cat whiskers drawn on their faces.

item.description: The bizarre string of incidents, which began on June 13 in the municipality of Lagos de Moreno, has left authorities investigating at least five cases over a span of 10 days.
item.content:encoded: The bizarre string of incidents, which began on June 13 in the municipality of Lagos de Moreno, has left authorities investigating at least five cases over a span of 10 days.
